name: tailwind-build
description: Compiles the Tailwind CSS used by frontend/templates/frontend/*.html into static bundles under frontend/static/css/. Replaces the old runtime cdn.tailwindcss.com <script> tag. Run `npm run build` after changing Tailwind classes/config, then commit the updated frontend/static/css/*.css files.

scripts.build: npm run build:default && npm run build:radius-a && npm run build:radius-b && npm run build:plain
